title: Air France Flight 447
cause: Pitot probe icing caused unreliable airspeed indications. The investigation also highlighted crew handling, stall recognition and automation awareness issues.
lesson: Automation awareness, unreliable airspeed procedure, manual flying and upset recovery are critical.

title: British Airways Flight 38
cause: Ice crystals restricted fuel flow through the fuel-oil heat exchanger during final approach.
lesson: Cold-weather fuel system behaviour and approach energy monitoring are important safety lessons.

title: Qantas Flight 32
cause: A defect in an oil feed pipe led to oil leakage, internal fire and uncontained engine failure.
lesson: Crew resource management, system knowledge and disciplined checklist handling prevented a major disaster.

title: Tenerife Airport Disaster
cause: Runway confusion, fog, radio communication issues and authority-gradient factors contributed to the collision.
lesson: Clear readback, runway awareness and cockpit resource management are essential.
